title: GBPUAT Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Teaching Personnel Posts
description: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 03 Teaching Personnel (MCA Self Finance) Posts. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, MCA cangrab this chance and apply for the GBPUAT Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Gover...
